text: - b. (Division 03) Precast Concrete - Structural and non-structural wall panels, spandrels, composite structural/ architectural wall panels, columns, beams, flat slab planks, double Tee plank, hollow-core plank, stairs, and structural steel erected by the precast subcontractor, modeled at the correct orientation, location and size.  All items to include embeds, haunches, ledges, openings, and bearing pockets to match the fabricated pieces.
